title: Tenant
description: v0 DRAFT. A contractor account on a Vantrow-subsidiary platform. Every other entity is scoped to exactly one tenant via tenant_id.

tenant_id.description: Equal to id. Present so every entity in the model carries the same envelope fields.

name.description: Display name of the contractor business.

vertical.description: Vertical slug of the producing platform (e.g. "roofing"). Doubles as the extension namespace root.

timezone.description: IANA timezone (e.g. "America/New_York"). Used to interpret business-day metrics.

currency.description: Default ISO 4217 currency for this tenant's Money values.
